The '''Eastern Dune Sea''' was a vast, empty expanse of sand on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], east of the [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] settlement, east of the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]]. It was home to a dangerous and fiercely protective tribe of [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]], as well as wild [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]] and [[Dewback/Legends|dewbacks]]. The [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]] of the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] built a temple there between [[30,000 BBY]] and [[25,200 BBY]] to house a [[Star Map]].

In [[3956 BBY]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] came to Tatooine in search of the Star Map, and aided Iziz in exchange for a map to the cave. At the same time, the hunter [[Komad Fortuna]] was hunting the [[Dune Sea krayt dragon|dragon]] itself. When Komad's partner was killed by the dragon after rushing impetuously into the cave, he and Revan teamed up to lure the dragon from its cave into a minefield Komad had set, using a bantha herd as bait. The dragon fell, and Komad retrieved two [[Krayt dragon pearl/Legends|krayt dragon pearls]] from its corpse. Revan found the Star Map in the darkest recesses of the cave, amidst the ruins of the Rakatan temple.<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Due to the open-ended nature of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', it is possible for [[Calo Nord]] and/or [[Darth Bandon]] to confront Revan as the player leaves the Star Map. In both cases, for the story line to continue, either Calo Nord or Darth Bandon must be defeated.<ref name="KOTOR" />
